hero.description: Market leader in Central Asia in the construction of renewable energy projects

stats.power_desc: HTQ participated in solar power plant construction projects with a total capacity of 160 MW
stats.cycle_desc: 90 MW Solar Power Plants built in Kazakhstan on a full cycle basis
stats.method_desc: Developed an effective methodology for successful project execution

projects.title: Projects
projects.desc: In everything we do, our goal is to minimize the risk for our customers, maximize project efficiency and profitability, and guarantee their long-term success.

projects_page.title: All Projects
projects_page.subtitle: Explore our complete portfolio of solar power plants across Central Asia

services.title: Our Role
services.desc: Hi-Tech Group is a seasoned team with a decade of expertise in executing renewable energy projects across Central Asia.

owners_engineer.title: Owner's Engineer Service
owners_engineer.desc: We facilitate communication among clients, EPC contractors, subcontractors, banks, governmental bodies, and consultancies. We monitor construction activities on-site to ensure quality, compliance with local laws, and adherence to safety and environmental standards.

pot.title: Pull Out Test (POT)
pot.desc: We offer Pull Out Test services customized for solar PV plants. Pile foundations are designed to withstand a variety of loads such as axial, lateral, moment, uplift, and combinations thereof.

construction.title: Construction Service
construction.desc: Our services include landscaping, earthworks, road construction, civil structures, assembly and installation operations, and electrical works, including AC installations.

commissioning.title: Commissioning and Grid Connection
commissioning.desc: We guide and oversee the grid connection process, including preparing testing programs for ASKUE, coordinating approvals for pilot industrial tests with grid operators.

maintenance.title: Operation and Maintenance
maintenance.desc: We evaluate the operational performance of PV plant components, maintain them according to manufacturers' guidelines, conduct hardware tests to ensure reliability.

services_page.title: All Services
services_page.subtitle: Comprehensive services for renewable energy projects

contacts_page.title: Contacts
contacts_page.subtitle: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet — find our office addresses and contact information below.

main.name: Main Office
main.address: Kazakhstan, Taraz, Akbulak microdistrict, Tarazova st., 9A

affiliated.name: Fish: Affiliated Company Name
affiliated.description: Fish: Brief description of the affiliated company and its connection to Hi-Tech Group.
affiliated.details: Fish: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. The company was founded in year fish and successfully implements projects in the field of renewable energy. We provide high quality services based on years of experience in the industry.

1.name: SAMARKAND SPP
1.description: Construction of the largest solar power plant in the Samarkand region. The project utilizes state-of-the-art PV technology and makes a significant contribution to Uzbekistan's renewable energy capacity.

2.name: Gulshat SPP
2.description: A key solar power plant in southern Kazakhstan. The facility plays an important role in meeting regional energy demands and supports the country's renewable energy targets.
2.tasks: EPC Contracting, Site Preparation, Solar Panel Installation

3.name: SHAULDER SPP
3.description: Located in the Aral region with optimal solar radiation conditions. The plant demonstrates Hi-Tech Group's capability to develop projects in challenging geographical locations.

4.name: Navoi SPP
4.description: A major solar power plant contributing to Uzbekistan's green energy transition. The project features advanced energy storage integration for improved grid stability.
4.tasks: Project Management, Substation Construction, POT Testing

5.name: Burnoye SPP
5.description: Utilizes advanced photovoltaic technology for maximum energy output. The plant is equipped with modern monitoring systems and automated maintenance protocols.
5.tasks: Full Cycle Construction, Automated Monitoring Setup

6.name: Zadarya SPP
6.description: A pilot project demonstrating Hi-Tech Group's full-cycle capabilities from design to commissioning. Serves as a reference site for future larger-scale developments.

7.name: Kuyonova SPP
7.description: A compact solar power plant with design optimized for local terrain conditions. The project showcases cost-effective solutions for small-scale renewable energy generation.
7.tasks: Terrain Analysis, Compact Installation, Grid Integration

8.name: Chulakkurgan SPP
8.description: A strategic project for regional energy security in western Kazakhstan. The plant integrates seamlessly with the existing power grid and enhances local energy resilience.
8.tasks: High Voltage Line Construction, Substation Upgrade

9.name: Tashkent SPP
9.description: Currently in the development phase with advanced engineering design underway. This will be one of the largest solar power plants in Uzbekistan upon completion.
9.tasks: Advanced Engineering, Environmental Assessment, Land Surveying

10.name: Zhezkazgan SPP
10.description: A small-scale demonstration project in central Kazakhstan showcasing innovative solar solutions. The facility serves as a testing ground for new photovoltaic technologies.
10.tasks: Experimental Install, Data Collection, Performance Analysis

about.title: We offer energy consulting services
about.p1: Here, in the Hi-Tech Group of companies, we sincerely believe that new technologies and solutions, new green projects will help preserve and enhance the world in which we live.
about.p2: We have the necessary knowledge and experience that will allow us to offer our customers comprehensive solutions for the development, implementation and project management in the renewable energy industry.
about.eco_desc: Committed to reducing carbon footprint through renewable energy solutions
